summary: The feature hardens canonical runtime admission so company-lookup and policy-store faults fail closed, keeps lifecycle/limits mutations on the canonical privileged control-plane path, and removes TenantRuntimeAccessService from production bean wiring without regressing the surrounding runtime/auth proof pack.

findings.description: TenantRuntimeEnforcementService now converts company lookup and settings-read failures into explicit service-unavailable denials instead of permissive fallback.
evidence: TenantRuntimeEnforcementService.java:690-709 throws TenantRuntimeAdmissionFailure with TENANT_COMPANY_LOOKUP_UNAVAILABLE when company lookup fails.
TenantRuntimeEnforcementService.java:792-806 throws TenantRuntimeAdmissionFailure with TENANT_RUNTIME_POLICY_UNAVAILABLE when settings reads fail.
TenantRuntimeEnforcementServiceTest.java:375-394 verifies 503 responses and reason codes for both failure modes.

findings.description: Policy mutations preserve the prior live policy if persistence or audit fails, matching the copy-on-write contract instead of partially activating a new state.
evidence: Worker handoff reports targeted runtime and security suites passed after these changes.

findings.description: Privileged runtime admission is restricted to canonical superadmin lifecycle and limits writes, while non-superadmin or malformed control-plane requests are denied.
evidence: CompanyContextFilterControlPlaneBindingTest.java:131-165 verifies privileged runtime admission for ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN limits writes.
CompanyContextFilterControlPlaneBindingTest.java:168-189 verifies canonical tenant control requests reject non-superadmin actors.
TenantRuntimeEnforcementServiceTest.java:197-236 verifies retired admin runtime-policy paths and unprivileged control requests are not admitted.

findings.description: TenantRuntimeAccessService no longer has Spring component registration, so it is no longer a production shadow owner.
evidence: TenantRuntimeAccessService.java has no @Service or @Component annotation at the class declaration.
TenantRuntimeAccessServiceTest.java continues to exercise the class directly as legacy coverage without relying on bean wiring.

findings.description: The feature kept focused regression coverage for fail-closed admission, control-plane binding, and truthsuite runtime enforcement.
evidence: Worker handoff: 118 targeted runtime and security tests passed.
Worker handoff: targeted security proof pack passed with 101 tests.
Local scrutiny validators also passed gate_fast, compile/typecheck, and lint.
